creator: Roads Clear
description: we're live! and the people love it... what can I say I GET them! you know what I mean? I am one of the people the people are one with me. I don't need a script or some middleman telling me what I can and can't play. and I'm sure as hell not going to start now that we have a captive audience. Ladies and gentlemen, the Chicago Space Ghost presents: Power Bands Pointed at the Screen. selling my data in exchange for expose on Instagram  @roadsclear  • showcasing my talents to internet strangers and confidants @RoadsClear on Twitch.TV • a SoundCloud just to say I have a SoundCloud @RoadsClear • excited to expand my musical journey through my uploads to Bandcamp @ you guessed it...
